ead.archdesc:
======= RMM02789Ladislas Segoe and Associates, City Planners records2789Compiled by R. Shepherd, R.R. JonesDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ladislas Segoe and Associates, City Planners records
Ladislas Segoe and Associates, City Planners
Williams, Sydney H.
2789
24.6 cubic feet. 24.6 cubic feet. 2 volumes.,
1924-1966. Reports, master plans, correspondence, job files, tape recordings, and a transcript. Includes reports, master plans, correspondence, and job files of Ladislas Segoe and Associates of Cincinnati, Ohio; and reports of the National Resources Committee (1937-1939). Master plans for Ohio cities, especially Cincinnati and Dayton; and many other areas. Correspondence regarding the Tennessee Valley Authority, Ohio State Planning Board, and Kentucky State Planning Board; and correspondence and job files concerning Greenville, Ohio. Also, tape recordings and published transcript of interview with Ladislas Segoe by Sydney H. Williams, May 1978. Collection material in English 2102890
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
R. Shepherd, R.R. Jones
Date completed:
May 1968
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, May 2002
Date modified:
Jude Corina, April 2015
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes reports, master plans, correspondence, and job files of Ladislas Segoe and Associates of Cincinnati, Ohio; and reports of the National Resources Committee (1937-1939). Master plans for Ohio cities, especially Cincinnati and Dayton; and many other areas, including Ashland, Kentucky; Charleston, West Virginia; Frederick, Maryland; Lansing and Detroit, Michigan; and Wayne County, Indiana. Correspondence regarding the Tennessee Valley Authority, Ohio State Planning Board, and Kentucky State Planning Board; and correspondence and job files concerning Greenville, Ohio. Also, tape recordings and published transcript of interview with Ladislas Segoe by Sydney H. Williams, May 1978.
Cite As:
Ladislas Segoe and Associates, City Planners records, #2789. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Wayne County (Ind.) Lansing (Mich.) -- City planning. Greenville (Ohio) -- City planning. Frederick (Md.) -- City planning. Detroit (Mich.) -- City planning. Dayton (Ohio) -- City planning. Cincinnati (Ohio) -- City planning. Charleston (W. Va.) -- City planning. Ashland (Ky.) -- City planning. City planning -- Ohio. City planning. Segoe, Ladislas. Kentucky. State Planning Board Ohio. State Planning Board Tennessee Valley Authority United States. National Resources Committee
